implementor.design_instruction: Prefer reusing existing code patterns and utilities. Stay within the plan/spec scope. Implement in small, clear, testable units. Write code comments in English.

tester.build_instruction: <REQUIRED: build command, e.g. 'npm run build' — or 'no build step' if not applicable>
tester.install_instruction: <REQUIRED: install command, e.g. 'npm ci' — or 'no install step' if not applicable>
tester.test_instruction: <REQUIRED: test command, e.g. 'npm test' — or 'no test step' if not applicable>

reviewer.focus: Adversarially review for correctness, boundary/exception handling, data integrity, security boundaries, and regression risk. Always verify that the spec's acceptance criteria are met.
